name="OPTIMIZER_HINT" value="/*+ APPEND, NOLOGGING ENABLE_PARALLEL_DML PARALLEL(4)*/" default="true"/> <option name="COMMIT" value="Yes" default="true"/> <option name="TRUNCATE_TARGET_TABLE" value="No" default="true"/> <option name="ERROR_HANDLING" value="No" default="true"/> <option name="DELETE ROWS" value="No" default="true"/> <option name="CREATE_TARGET_TABLE" value="No" default="true"/> <option name="ANALYZE_TARGET_TABLE" value="Yes" default="true"/> <option name="ANALYZE_PARTITION_NAME" value="null" default="true"/> <option name="ANALYZE_STALE_ONLY" value="null" default="true"/> <option name="ANALYZE_GROUP_NAME" value="null" default="true"/> <option name="ERROR_TABLE_NAME" value="ERR$_" default="true"/> <option name="THRESHOLD_LIMIT" value="#GLOBAL.ERR_THRESHOLD_LIMIT" default="true"/> <option name="SESSION_NUMBER" value="Default" default="true"/> </node> <node name="CLS_TAX_LOTS_NON_BKR_FACT" type="CKM" km="CKM Oracle.SSDS"> <option name="DROP_ERROR_TABLE" value="false" default="true"/> <option name="DROP_CHECK_TABLE" value="false" default="true"/> <option name="CREATE_ERROR_INDEX" value="true" default="true"/> <option name="CREATE_FLOW_INDEX" value="true" default="true"/> <option name="COMPATIBLE" value="9" default="true"/> <option name="VALIDATE" value="false" default="true"/> <option name="ENABLE_EDITION_SUPPORT" value="false" default="true"/> <option name="UPGRADE_ERROR_TABLE" value="false" default="true"/> </node> <node name="LOOKUP4" type="XKM" km="XKM Oracle Lookup.GLOBAL"/> <node name="LOOKUP5" type="XKM" km="XKM Oracle Lookup.GLOBAL"/> <node name="LOOKUP3" type="XKM" km="XKM Oracle Lookup.GLOBAL"/> <node name="FILTER2" type="XKM" km="XKM SQL Filter.GLOBAL"/> <node name="FILTER3" type="XKM" km="XKM SQL Filter.GLOBAL"/> <node name="CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP" type="XKM" km="XKM Oracle Extract.GLOBAL"> <option name="CUSTOM_TEMPLATE" value=" " default="true"/> <option name="SELECT_HINT" value=" " default="true"/> </node> <node name="LOOKUP" type="XKM" km="XKM Oracle Lookup.GLOBAL"/> <node name="ACG_TP_DIM" type="XKM" km="XKM Oracle Extract.GLOBAL"> <option name="CUSTOM_TEMPLATE" value=" " default="true"/> <option name="SELECT_HINT" value=" " default="true"/> </node> <node name="CL_VAL2" type="XKM" km="XKM Oracle Extract.GLOBAL"> <option name="CUSTOM_TEMPLATE" value=" " default="true"/> <option name="SELECT_HINT" value=" " default="true"/> </node> <node name="CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT" type="XKM" km="XKM Oracle Extract.GLOBAL"> <option name="CUSTOM_TEMPLATE" value=" " default="true"/> <option name="SELECT_HINT" value=" " default="true"/> </node> <node name="CL_VAL1" type="XKM" km="XKM Oracle Extract.GLOBAL"> <option name="CUSTOM_TEMPLATE" value=" " default="true"/> <option name="SELECT_HINT" value=" " default="true"/> </node> <target name="CLS_TAX_LOTS_NON_BKR_FACT" resource="CLS_TAX_LOTS_NON_BKR_FACT" model="SSDS_TAXLOTS_OWNER" logicalSchema="TAXLOTS_OWNER" forcedContext=""/> </map-generation-info>
IKM RJ Oracle Simple Insert Std V2.0
IKM RJ Oracle Simple Insert Std V2.0
IKM RJ Oracle Simple Insert Std V2.0
IKM RJ Oracle Simple Insert Std V2.0
IKM RJ Oracle Simple Insert Std V2.0
IKM RJ Oracle Simple Insert Std V2.0

insert /*+ APPEND, NOLOGGING ENABLE_PARALLEL_DML PARALLEL(4)*/ into <?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "CLS_TAX_LOTS_NON_BKR_FACT", "TAXLOTS_OWNER", "D") ?> ( ACG_TP_CD, ACG_TP_ID, ACG_TP_NM, ACQ_DT, ADJ_COST, ADJ_COST_GAIN_LOSS, ADJ_COST_GAIN_LOSS_PCT, ADJ_COST_NOT_ACRT_F, AR_ID, CCAL_PD_ID, CIRD_PD_ID, SUB_LOT_MSTR_ID, CCY_CD, CLS_DT, CLS_PRC_FCTR, CLS_TXN_EV_TP, COST_AMT, COST_BSS_LEGS_CVR_CD, CTF_NUM, CTF_NUM_PFX, DISALWD_WASH_SALE_AMT, DSPN_DT, DSPN_PRC, DSPN_PROCD, DSPN_MTH_CD, EXG_RATE, FAIR_MKT_VAL_OF_GIFT_OR_INHTN, GAIN_LOSS_AMT, GIFT_DT, LIFE_TO_DTD_MKT_DCN, LONG_SHRT_POS_CD, LOSS_NOT_ALWD_F, MISS_COST_BSS_F, OPN_AMT, OPN_PRC_FCTR, OPN_TXN_EV_TP, ORIG_EV_TP, ORIG_PRC, ORIG_PROCD, ORIG_TXN_TP_CD, POS_INCPTN_DT, PREM_AMT, QTY, RLZD_CLS_F, RLZD_PROCD_AMT, RVST_LOT_F, SBC_ADJ_COST, SBC_CLS_PRC_FCTR, SBC_COST_AMT, SBC_DISALWD_WASH_SALE_AMT, SBC_FAIR_MKT_VAL, SBC_OPN_PRC_FCTR, SBC_ORIG_PRC, SBC_ORIG_PROCD, SBC_UC, SD, SRC_RCRD_TP_CD, SRC_STM_CD, SRC_STM_ID, SRC_STM_NM, TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_PRIM, TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_SCDY, TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_TRTY, TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_QTRNY, TRD_NUM, TXN_INTT_DT, TXN_TP_CD, UC, WASH_SALE_F, WASH_SALE_TP, ZERO_COST_BSS_F, OPN_DT, ADJ_COST_GAIN_AMT, ADJ_COST_LOSS_AMT, TERM_TP_CD, MISS_ADJ_COST_F, IRS_1099B_REPORTABLE_F, POS_CLS_TP, SESN_NUM, CRT_DTM, CRT_USR_NM, LAST_UDT_DTM, LAST_UDT_USR_NM ) select CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.ACG_TP_CODE, ACG_TP_DIM.ACG_TP_ID, ACG_TP_DIM.ACG_TP_DSC, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.TD, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_OPN_ADJ_COST_AMT ELSE CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_OPN_ADJ_COST_AMT * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.ADJCOSTGAINLOSSAMT, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.ADJCOSTGAINLOSSPCT, NULL, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.AR_ID, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.CCAL_PD_ID, CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP_1.CIRD_PD_ID, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SUB_LOT_MSTR_ID, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.CLSDT, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_CLS_PRC_FCTR, CL_VAL3_1.CL_VAL_NM, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_CCY_OPN_COST_AMT ELSE CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_CCY_OPN_COST_AMT * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.ISCOVERED, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.TAX_LOT_CTF_NUM, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.TAX_LOT_CTF_NUM_PFX, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_WASH_SALE_AMT ELSE CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_WASH_SALE_AMT * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.TXN_INTT_DT, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_CCY_RLZD_PRC, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_CCY_RLZD_PROCD_AMT, CASE WHEN INSTR(CL_VAL4_1.CL_VAL_NM, '=') > 0 THEN TRIM(SUBSTR(CL_VAL4_1.CL_VAL_NM, INSTR(CL_VAL4_1.CL_VAL_NM, '=') + 1)) ELSE NULL END, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_CCY_OPN_FAIR_MKT_VAL_AMT else CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_CCY_OPN_FAIR_MKT_VAL_AMT * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_CCY_RLZD_GAIN_LOSS_AMT, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.GIFT_DT, NULL, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.POS_LONG_SHRT_CODE, NULL, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.MISS_COST_F, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.OPNAMT, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_OPN_PRC_FCTR else CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_OPN_PRC_FCTR * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, NULL, NULL, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_ORIG_PRC, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_ORIG_PROCD_AMT else CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_ORIG_PROCD_AMT * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, NULL, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.POS_INCPTN_DT, NULL, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SUB_LOT_QTY, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.RLZD_GAIN_LOSS_F, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_CCY_RLZD_PROCD_AMT, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.RVST_F, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_OPN_ADJ_COST_AMT else CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_OPN_ADJ_COST_AMT * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_CLS_PRC_FCTR, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_OPN_COST_AMT else CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_OPN_COST_AMT * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_CCY_WASH_SALE_AMT else CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_CCY_WASH_SALE_AMT * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_CCY_OPN_FAIR_MKT_VAL_AMT else CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_CCY_OPN_FAIR_MKT_VAL_AMT * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_OPN_PRC_FCTR else CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_OPN_PRC_FCTR * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_ORIG_PRC else CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_ORIG_PRC * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_ORIG_PROCD_AMT else CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_ORIG_PROCD_AMT * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_OPN_PER_UC_AMT else CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_OPN_PER_UC_AMT * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SD, CL_VAL2.CL_VAL_CODE, 'RJTRST1', 6, 'Raymond James Trust', CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SUB_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_PRIM, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SUB_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_SCDY, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SUB_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_TRTY, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SUB_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_QTRNY, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.TRD_NUM, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.TXN_INTT_DT, CL_VAL1_1.CL_VAL_CODE, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_OPN_PER_UC_AMT else CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_OPN_PER_UC_AMT * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.WASH_SALE_F, CASE WHEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.WASH_SALE_F ='Y' AND CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_WASH_SALE_AMT = 0 THEN 'CBW' WHEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.WASH_SALE_F ='Y' AND CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_WASH_SALE_AMT > 0 THEN 'BOTHW' WHEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.WASH_SALE_F <> 'Y' AND CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_WASH_SALE_AMT > 0 THEN 'GLW' else null END, CASE WHEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.ZERO_BSS_IND_F ='01' then 'Y' ELSE 'N' END, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.OPNDT, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.ADJCOSTGAINAMT, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.ADJCOSTLOSSAMT, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.TERMTP, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.HASMISSADJCOST, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.ISCOVERED, 'Closed', #GLOBAL.GV_ODI_SESS_NO, SYSDATE, '<?=odiRef.getSession("SESS_NAME") ?>', SYSTIMESTAMP, '<?=odiRef.getSession("SESS_NAME") ?>' from (((((<?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT", "TAXLOT_STG_OWNER", "D") ?> CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT LEFT OUTER JOIN <?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "ACG_TP_DIM", "COMMON_OWNER", "D") ?> ACG_TP_DIM ON ACG_TP_DIM.ACG_TP_CD = CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.ACG_TP_CODE ) LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CL_VAL1.CL_VAL_ID AS CL_VAL_ID , CL_VAL1.CL_VAL_CODE AS CL_VAL_CODE , CL_VAL1.CL_SCM_ID AS CL_SCM_ID FROM <?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "CL_VAL", "CCAL_REPL_OWNER", "D") ?> CL_VAL1 WHERE (CL_VAL1.CL_SCM_ID=84 ) ) CL_VAL1_1 ON CL_VAL1_1.CL_VAL_ID=CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SUB_LOT_TXN_TP_ID ) LEFT OUTER JOIN <?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "CL_VAL", "CCAL_REPL_OWNER", "D") ?> CL_VAL2 ON CL_VAL2.CL_VAL_ID=CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SRC_RCRD_TP_ID ) LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CL_VAL3.CL_VAL_ID AS CL_VAL_ID , CL_VAL3.CL_SCM_ID AS CL_SCM_ID , CL_VAL3.CL_VAL_NM AS CL_VAL_NM FROM <?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "CL_VAL", "CCAL_REPL_OWNER", "D") ?> CL_VAL3 WHERE (CL_VAL3.CL_SCM_ID=86 ) ) CL_VAL3_1 ON CL_VAL3_1.CL_VAL_ID=CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SUB_LOT_TXN_EV_TP_ID ) LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CL_VAL4.CL_VAL_ID AS CL_VAL_ID , CL_VAL4.CL_SCM_ID AS CL_SCM_ID , CL_VAL4.CL_VAL_NM AS CL_VAL_NM FROM <?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "CL_VAL", "CCAL_REPL_OWNER", "D") ?> CL_VAL4 WHERE (CL_VAL4.CL_SCM_ID=85 ) ) CL_VAL4_1 ON CL_VAL4_1.CL_VAL_ID=CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SUB_LOT_RLZD_ACG_MTH_TP_ID ) LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP.CCAL_PD_ID AS CCAL_PD_ID , CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP.CIRD_PD_ID AS CIRD_PD_ID , CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP.ACTV_F AS ACTV_F FROM <?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP", "CCAL_REPL_OWNER", "D") ?> CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP WHERE (CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP.ACTV_F='Y' ) ) CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP_1 ON CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP_1.CCAL_PD_ID=CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.CCAL_PD_ID where (1=1)
IKM RJ Oracle Simple Insert Std V2.0
IKM RJ Oracle Simple Insert Std V2.0

insert /*+ APPEND, NOLOGGING ENABLE_PARALLEL_DML PARALLEL(4)*/ into <?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "CLS_TAX_LOTS_NON_BKR_FACT", "TAXLOTS_OWNER", "D") ?> ( ACG_TP_CD, ACG_TP_ID, ACG_TP_NM, ACQ_DT, ADJ_COST, ADJ_COST_GAIN_LOSS, ADJ_COST_GAIN_LOSS_PCT, ADJ_COST_NOT_ACRT_F, AR_ID, CCAL_PD_ID, CIRD_PD_ID, SUB_LOT_MSTR_ID, CCY_CD, CLS_DT, CLS_PRC_FCTR, CLS_TXN_EV_TP, COST_AMT, COST_BSS_LEGS_CVR_CD, CTF_NUM, CTF_NUM_PFX, DISALWD_WASH_SALE_AMT, DSPN_DT, DSPN_PRC, DSPN_PROCD, DSPN_MTH_CD, EXG_RATE, FAIR_MKT_VAL_OF_GIFT_OR_INHTN, GAIN_LOSS_AMT, GIFT_DT, LIFE_TO_DTD_MKT_DCN, LONG_SHRT_POS_CD, LOSS_NOT_ALWD_F, MISS_COST_BSS_F, OPN_AMT, OPN_PRC_FCTR, OPN_TXN_EV_TP, ORIG_EV_TP, ORIG_PRC, ORIG_PROCD, ORIG_TXN_TP_CD, POS_INCPTN_DT, PREM_AMT, QTY, RLZD_CLS_F, RLZD_PROCD_AMT, RVST_LOT_F, SBC_ADJ_COST, SBC_CLS_PRC_FCTR, SBC_COST_AMT, SBC_DISALWD_WASH_SALE_AMT, SBC_FAIR_MKT_VAL, SBC_OPN_PRC_FCTR, SBC_ORIG_PRC, SBC_ORIG_PROCD, SBC_UC, SD, SRC_RCRD_TP_CD, SRC_STM_CD, SRC_STM_ID, SRC_STM_NM, TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_PRIM, TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_SCDY, TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_TRTY, TAX_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_QTRNY, TRD_NUM, TXN_INTT_DT, TXN_TP_CD, UC, WASH_SALE_F, WASH_SALE_TP, ZERO_COST_BSS_F, OPN_DT, ADJ_COST_GAIN_AMT, ADJ_COST_LOSS_AMT, TERM_TP_CD, MISS_ADJ_COST_F, IRS_1099B_REPORTABLE_F, POS_CLS_TP, SESN_NUM, CRT_DTM, CRT_USR_NM, LAST_UDT_DTM, LAST_UDT_USR_NM ) select CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.ACG_TP_CODE, ACG_TP_DIM.ACG_TP_ID, ACG_TP_DIM.ACG_TP_DSC, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.TD, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_OPN_ADJ_COST_AMT ELSE CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_OPN_ADJ_COST_AMT * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.ADJCOSTGAINLOSSAMT, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.ADJCOSTGAINLOSSPCT, NULL, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.AR_ID, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.CCAL_PD_ID, CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP_1.CIRD_PD_ID, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SUB_LOT_MSTR_ID, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.CLSDT, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_CLS_PRC_FCTR, CL_VAL3_1.CL_VAL_NM, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_CCY_OPN_COST_AMT ELSE CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_CCY_OPN_COST_AMT * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.ISCOVERED, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.TAX_LOT_CTF_NUM, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.TAX_LOT_CTF_NUM_PFX, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_WASH_SALE_AMT ELSE CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_WASH_SALE_AMT * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.TXN_INTT_DT, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_CCY_RLZD_PRC, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_CCY_RLZD_PROCD_AMT, CASE WHEN INSTR(CL_VAL4_1.CL_VAL_NM, '=') > 0 THEN TRIM(SUBSTR(CL_VAL4_1.CL_VAL_NM, INSTR(CL_VAL4_1.CL_VAL_NM, '=') + 1)) ELSE NULL END, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_CCY_OPN_FAIR_MKT_VAL_AMT else CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_CCY_OPN_FAIR_MKT_VAL_AMT * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_CCY_RLZD_GAIN_LOSS_AMT, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.GIFT_DT, NULL, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.POS_LONG_SHRT_CODE, NULL, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.MISS_COST_F, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.OPNAMT, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_OPN_PRC_FCTR else CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_OPN_PRC_FCTR * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, NULL, NULL, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_ORIG_PRC, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_ORIG_PROCD_AMT else CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_ORIG_PROCD_AMT * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, NULL, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.POS_INCPTN_DT, NULL, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SUB_LOT_QTY, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.RLZD_GAIN_LOSS_F, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_CCY_RLZD_PROCD_AMT, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.RVST_F, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_OPN_ADJ_COST_AMT else CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_OPN_ADJ_COST_AMT * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_CLS_PRC_FCTR, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_OPN_COST_AMT else CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_OPN_COST_AMT * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_CCY_WASH_SALE_AMT else CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_CCY_WASH_SALE_AMT * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_CCY_OPN_FAIR_MKT_VAL_AMT else CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_CCY_OPN_FAIR_MKT_VAL_AMT * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_OPN_PRC_FCTR else CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_OPN_PRC_FCTR * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_ORIG_PRC else CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_ORIG_PRC * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_ORIG_PROCD_AMT else CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_ORIG_PROCD_AMT * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_OPN_PER_UC_AMT else CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_OPN_PER_UC_AMT * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SD, CL_VAL2.CL_VAL_CODE, 'RJTRST1', 6, 'Raymond James Trust', CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SUB_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_PRIM, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SUB_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_SCDY, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SUB_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_TRTY, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SUB_LOT_EXT_REFR_KEY_QTRNY, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.TRD_NUM, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.TXN_INTT_DT, CL_VAL1_1.CL_VAL_CODE, case when (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.NML_ISO_CCY_CODE ='USD' or (CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE is NULL OR CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE = 0)) THEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_OPN_PER_UC_AMT else CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_OPN_PER_UC_AMT * CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_EXG_RATE END, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.WASH_SALE_F, CASE WHEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.WASH_SALE_F ='Y' AND CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_WASH_SALE_AMT = 0 THEN 'CBW' WHEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.WASH_SALE_F ='Y' AND CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_WASH_SALE_AMT > 0 THEN 'BOTHW' WHEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.WASH_SALE_F <> 'Y' AND CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SBC_WASH_SALE_AMT > 0 THEN 'GLW' else null END, CASE WHEN CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.ZERO_BSS_IND_F ='01' then 'Y' ELSE 'N' END, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.OPNDT, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.ADJCOSTGAINAMT, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.ADJCOSTLOSSAMT, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.TERMTP, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.HASMISSADJCOST, CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.ISCOVERED, 'Closed', #GLOBAL.GV_ODI_SESS_NO, SYSDATE, '<?=odiRef.getSession("SESS_NAME") ?>', SYSTIMESTAMP, '<?=odiRef.getSession("SESS_NAME") ?>' from (((((<?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT", "TAXLOT_STG_OWNER", "D") ?> CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT LEFT OUTER JOIN <?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "ACG_TP_DIM", "COMMON_OWNER", "D") ?> ACG_TP_DIM ON ACG_TP_DIM.ACG_TP_CD = CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.ACG_TP_CODE ) LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CL_VAL1.CL_VAL_ID AS CL_VAL_ID , CL_VAL1.CL_VAL_CODE AS CL_VAL_CODE , CL_VAL1.CL_SCM_ID AS CL_SCM_ID FROM <?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "CL_VAL", "CCAL_REPL_OWNER", "D") ?> CL_VAL1 WHERE (CL_VAL1.CL_SCM_ID=84 ) ) CL_VAL1_1 ON CL_VAL1_1.CL_VAL_ID=CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SUB_LOT_TXN_TP_ID ) LEFT OUTER JOIN <?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "CL_VAL", "CCAL_REPL_OWNER", "D") ?> CL_VAL2 ON CL_VAL2.CL_VAL_ID=CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SRC_RCRD_TP_ID ) LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CL_VAL3.CL_VAL_ID AS CL_VAL_ID , CL_VAL3.CL_SCM_ID AS CL_SCM_ID , CL_VAL3.CL_VAL_NM AS CL_VAL_NM FROM <?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "CL_VAL", "CCAL_REPL_OWNER", "D") ?> CL_VAL3 WHERE (CL_VAL3.CL_SCM_ID=86 ) ) CL_VAL3_1 ON CL_VAL3_1.CL_VAL_ID=CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SUB_LOT_TXN_EV_TP_ID ) LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CL_VAL4.CL_VAL_ID AS CL_VAL_ID , CL_VAL4.CL_SCM_ID AS CL_SCM_ID , CL_VAL4.CL_VAL_NM AS CL_VAL_NM FROM <?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "CL_VAL", "CCAL_REPL_OWNER", "D") ?> CL_VAL4 WHERE (CL_VAL4.CL_SCM_ID=85 ) ) CL_VAL4_1 ON CL_VAL4_1.CL_VAL_ID=CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.SUB_LOT_RLZD_ACG_MTH_TP_ID ) LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP.CCAL_PD_ID AS CCAL_PD_ID , CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP.CIRD_PD_ID AS CIRD_PD_ID , CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP.ACTV_F AS ACTV_F FROM <?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP", "CCAL_REPL_OWNER", "D") ?> CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP WHERE (CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP.ACTV_F='Y' ) ) CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP_1 ON CCAL_CIRD_PD_MAP_1.CCAL_PD_ID=CLOSE_TAX_LOT_NONBKR_RJTRUST_TGT.CCAL_PD_ID where (1=1)
IKM RJ Oracle Simple Insert Std V2.0
